summary: Completed frontend testing of 'Guerra Total' mode bug fix. All features working correctly - both USA and USSR missiles now fly simultaneously with different colored trajectories (blue for USA, red for USSR).
passed_tests: Difficulty selector works - can select 'Guerra Total' mode
USA vs CCCP scoreboard appears in Guerra Total mode
Fire button launches USA missile (blue trajectory)
USSR retaliates after ~3 seconds with red missile
BOTH missiles fly simultaneously on screen (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
USA missile has blue trajectory trail
USSR missile has red trajectory trail
Toast notifications display correctly (Lançamento Detectado, URSS Revidando, etc.)
Reset button clears all projectiles and explosions
Game continues working correctly after reset
USSR tower design appears in Guerra Total mode
Angle and velocity sliders work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for simultaneous missile flight in 'Guerra Total' mode has been verified. The projectilesRef unified management system and runGameLoop function are working correctly. Both USA (blue) and USSR (red) missiles can now fly at the same time with their respective trajectory colors.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: USA missile disappeared when USSR missile was launched
bug_fix_verification.fix_implemented: Unified projectile management system (projectilesRef) with single animation loop (runGameLoop)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Both missiles now fly simultaneously with correct trajectory colors
